description: May, Hunter, and Skye arrive in Canada to extract Raina with assistance from the Koenigs. They encounter Agent 33—still wearing May's face—and multiple HYDRA agents, leading to a brief skirmish. Skye manages to retrieve Raina and they escape Hydra's pursuit, regrouping with the rest of the team as May arrives in a commandeered HYDRA van.

transcript.line: Excuse me, mate. Somebody call an ambulance! This guy just passed out!
No, I'm Sam. Billy's the shorter one.
Yeah, we're brothers. Of course we have a knock. Lanyard, please.
Come on, Sam. You can't just look through the damn peep hole?
I'm Billy. Sam's the shorter one.
Okay. Right. Well, we need to move. Come on. Go for the stairs!
Stand down, Agent 33! We can help you! Unh!
There's more coming. We need to... What the hell is that?
May's evil twin, formerly known as Agent 33.
I thought the Koenigs were creepy.
Tell Coulson we're on our way.
